docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR NOV-30-2022 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO:DEFENDANT - BRITTANY MEGAN; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2023 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-13-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA ROGERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRITTANY MEGAN IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMS IN COURT THAT THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS BROKEN; SHE HAS ONLY RECEIVED ONE PAYMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $350 (CHECK) ON FEB-08, 2023 WHICH HAS BEEN CASHED BY HER. CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR GIVING DEFENDANT BRITTANY MEGAN AN OPPORTUNITY TO APPEAR AT THE NEXT TRIAL DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROGERS, PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEGAN, BRITTANY $1,625.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,625.00, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO BE PAID HER CLAIM OF $2000 LESS $375 THAT DEFENDANT HAS PAID TOWARD THE AMOUNT OWED PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS THEREFORE AWARDED $1625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY ROGERS, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT MEGAN, BRITTANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>) SERVED SEP-01-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MEGAN, BRITTANY

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROGERS, PATRICIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-28-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA ROGERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRITTANY MEGAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GROVER. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA ROGERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRITTANY MEGAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. . JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ROGERS, PATRICIA
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE APR-24-2023 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL ON DEC-07-2022, CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO BRITTANY MEGAN, NO SUCH NUMBER UNABLE TO FORWARD.
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE MAR-14-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2023 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: PER SECURITY DIRECTOR JOSEPH PINTOR, THERE IS NO ONE BY THE NAME OF BRITTANY MEGAN AT THIS ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROGERS, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT MEGAN, BRITTANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2022 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO NOV-30-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA ROGERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRITTANY MEGAN IS PRESENT. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-08-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA ROGERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRITTANY MEGAN IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A TOTAL OF $750.00 TO THE PLAINTIFF WITH A PAYMENT PLAN IN 2 PAYMENTS OF $375.00 EACH. FIRST PAYMENT IS TO BE MADE ON JANUARY 31, 2023, AND SECOND PAYMENT IS TO BE MADE ON FEBRUARY 28, 2023. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MARCH 8, 2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
